name: RABBIT-CAGE-BUG-89
title: Initial [rabbit] welcome message missing on startup
description: On startup, the initial welcome message emitted by [rabbit] is no longer displayed. The banner/greeting that previously appeared when a session began is now gone, reducing user visibility into whether the rabbit workflow is active.

history.note: Fixed by RABBIT-CAGE-BACKLOG-19: welcome banner added to session-init.py (commit c82d474)
